direct.name: AutoGPT
direct.reason: Pioneering open-source general autonomous AI agent that supports self-directed multi-step task orchestration, web browsing and cross-source data aggregation to complete full end-to-end general competitor analysis workflows without frequent human prompting

direct.name: OpenAI GPT-4o Advanced Agents
direct.reason: Official native general AI agent product from OpenAI that natively supports long-running task planning, third-party tool calling, and public information crawling to generate structured, data-backed general competitor analysis reports

substitute.name: Standard ChatGPT 4o Conversational Chatbot
substitute.reason: General conversational large language model that can generate competitor analysis content based on manually input user prompts, but lacks native autonomous agent capabilities to automatically run multi-step data collection, fact verification and iterative analysis workflows

substitute.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
substitute.reason: Conversational AI assistant integrated with the Microsoft 365 ecosystem that can leverage internal enterprise data to generate partial competitor-related insights, but is not purpose-built as a general autonomous AI agent for full end-to-end competitor analysis

![](https://psstatic.cdn.bcebos.com/basics/aichat/search_1761738231000.png)

机器之心Pro

机器之心报道

**机器之心编辑部**

还记得去年 AI 大牛 Andrej Karpathy 大力宣传的「AutoGPT」项目吗？它是一个由 GPT-4 驱动的实验性开源应用程序，可以自主实现用户设定的任何目标，展现出了自主 AI 的发展趋势。

一年多的时间，该项目的 GitHub 星标总数已经超过了 16 万，足可见其持续受欢迎的程度。

![](https://pics0.baidu.com/feed/78310a55b319ebc481c43326823699f21f1716ea.jpeg@f_auto?token=636e12aa237d60788d4281ae45daa4c0)

GitHub 地址：https://github.com/Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT

昨日，项目作者在社媒 X 上宣布了下一代「AutoGPT」的到来，目前是 Pre-alpha 版本。与前代相比，下一代「AutoGPT」让构建、运行和共享 AI 智能体变得比以往任何时候都更容易，同时可靠性也大大提升。

![](https://pics6.baidu.com/feed/3bf33a87e950352adc0affd65353adfcb3118ba7.jpeg@f_auto?token=d736a66b692bcf680c2be4e9644874bf)

图源：https://x.com/SigGravitas/status/181280

sample.title: AutoGPT的真实体验:打破封闭性的AI工具
sample.snippet: AutoGPT最近在社交媒体上刷屏,它可以从外部网络获取信息,并使用这些信息来训练和优化GPT模型。这个功能的出现打开了人们的想象空间,但是,这一功能到底有多“Auto”呢? 为了测试AutoGPT的真实能力,我在AWS服务器上部署了这个工具,并对其进行了测试。我给AutoGPT下达了一个任务:以“chatpdf功能的工具网站(http://www.chatspdf.cn),如何推广给更多人使用”为题,编写一个可行的落地方案。 我花费了很长时间尝试各种方法,但最终却没有成功。我向AutoGPT询问是否有任何建议,但是,它并没有给我一个令人满意的答复。虽然AutoGPT具备了从外部网络获取信息的能力,但是,它在解决实际问题时的表现并不尽如人意。 最后实在等不了了,我说: give me a result according current info you've got 他告诉我: I apologize, but I have not received any new information from you since my last response. Please let me
sample.license_or_tos_note: public web source, compliance checkpoint recorded
sample.content_excerpt:
![](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/622352946)

AutoGPT最近在社交媒体上刷屏，它可以从外部网络获取信息，并使用这些信息来训练和优化GPT模型。这个功能的出现打开了人们的想象空间，但是，这一功能到底有多“Auto”呢？

为了测试AutoGPT的真实能力，我在AWS服务器上部署了这个工具，并对其进行了测试。我给AutoGPT下达了一个任务：以“chatpdf功能的工具网站（ [http://www.chatspdf.cn](https://link.zhihu.com/?target=http%3A//www.chatspdf.cn)），如何推广给更多人使用”为题，编写一个可行的落地方案。

我花费了很长时间尝试各种方法，但最终却没有成功。我向AutoGPT询问是否有任何建议，但是，它并没有给我一个令人满意的答复。虽然AutoGPT具备了从外部网络获取信息的能力，但是，它在解决实际问题时的表现并不尽如人意。

最后实在等不了了，我说：

give me a result according current info you've got

他告诉我：

I apologize, but I have not received any new information from you since my last response. Please let me know if there is anything specific you would like me to do or if you have any questions.

综合来看，我认为这种技术的发展还有很大的探索空间。我们可以通过预定义的流程和动作，获取外部信息并进行分析，这可以应用于很多领域。但是，要实现商业化的应用，我们需要结合具体的业务场景，对AutoGPT进行定制开发，才能发挥出更大的价值。

目前，AutoGPT还没有达到商业化应用的水平，但是，随着技术的不断发展，我们有理由相信，它会越来越智能，越来越“Auto”。

下面是整个过程，比较长，反正就是去各个网站找内容，找到内容分析，存储到本地，循环往复。大概浏览即可。

```text
(venv) [root@ip-172-31-29-153 Auto-GPT]# python -m auto

sample.title: OpenAI公布2025年将发布的技术产品:AGI、Agents、GPT-4o升级版
sample.snippet: OpenAI公布2025年将发布的技术产品:AGI、Agents、GPT-4o升级版 OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman公布了2025年即将发布的技术产品。 12月31日凌晨,OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼(Sam Altman)公布了2025年即将发布的技术产品。 分别是:AGI(通用人工智能)、Agents(智能体)、更好的GPT-4o升级版、更好的记忆存储、更好的上下文窗口、“Grow up mode”(成人模式)、深度研究特色功能、更好的Sora、更好的个性化定制。

sample.title: GPT‑4o mini: advancing cost-efficient intelligence
sample.snippet: GPT‑4o mini: advancing cost-efficient intelligence OpenAI is committed to making intelligence as broadly accessible as possible. Today, we're announcing GPT‑4o mini, our most cost-efficient small model. We expect GPT‑4o mini will significantly expand the range of applications built with AI by making intelligence much more affordable. GPT‑4o mini scores 82% on MMLU and currently outperforms GPT‑41on chat preferences inLMSYS leaderboard⁠(opens in a new window). It is priced at 15 cents per million

# Manage and Extend Microsoft 365 Copilot (MS-4017)

Course 8749 [Advantage Plan Course](/plans/advantage-enterprise/)

* Duration: **1 day**
* Language: **English**
* Level: **Intermediate**

This course examines how administrators can manage and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot to meet their business needs. The course introduces you to Copilot, examines how to implement and administer it, and then explores the fundamentals of Copilot extensibility.

# Ignite 2024: Why nearly 70% of the Fortune 500 now use Microsoft 365 Copilot

| Microsoft Hong Kong

Two things can be true at the same time.

In the case of AI, it is absolutely true that the industry is moving incredibly fast and evolving quickly. It’s also true that hundreds of thousands of customers are using Microsoft AI technology today and, by making early bets on the platform, are seeing big benefits now and future-proofing their ability to benefit from the next big wave of AI improvements.

[**Microsoft Ignite**](https://ignite.microsoft.com/en-US/home) is our annual event that spotlights the updates and creations that enable customers, partners and developers to unleash the full potential of Microsoft’s technology and change the way we approach work.
